text.p: I write on behalf of Management to acknowledge receipt of your notification of end of sabbatical appointment with the University. We believe you had an interesting and a rewarding career experience here. As a University, we deeply appreciate your interest and commitment to the duties assigned to you in the course of the year. Your dutiful and single-minded Secretariat Coordination of the International Conference on Human Development (ICHD 2005) and your excellent performance as the College Exams Coordinator readily comes to mind among others. Please be assured that the doors of the University are open to you if anytime in the future you desire to be a part of the work here on full time basis and we really encourage you to give it a thought. Your commitment, dedication and vision alignment makes an invitation such as we are here extending a cheerful and willing offer.

It is our understanding that having shared so richly and having been so connected with us, you have become a part of the University vision and we expect you to be an ambassador of our values and a marketer of our products.
May the good Lord uphold you in all your future endeavours. Amen
